children.heading: Technology application and market development plan
children.label: a Technology application and market development plan

children.text: an assessment of those Government actions required to achieve a two-hundred- to four-hundred-megawatt electrical-commercial demonstration of ocean thermal energy conversion systems in time to have industry meet the goal contained in including a listing of those financial, property, and patent right packages most likely to lead to early commercial demonstration at minimum cost to the Federal Government;section 9001(b)(2) of this title
an assessment of further Government actions required to permit expansion of the domestic ocean thermal energy conversion industry to meet the goal contained in ;section 9001(b)(3) of this title
an analysis of further Government actions necessary to aid the industry in minimizing and removing any legal and institutional barriers such as the designation of a lead agency; and
an assessment of the necessary Government actions to assist in eliminating economic uncertainties through financial incentives, such as loan guarantees, price supports, or other inducements.

children.heading: Transmittal of plan to Congress
children.label: b Transmittal of plan to Congress
children.text: The Secretary shall transmit such comprehensive technology application and market development plan to the Congress within three years after , and update the plan on an annual basis thereafter.July 17, 1980

children.heading: Respondent proposals
children.label: c Respondent proposals
children.text: As part of the competitive procurement initiative for design and construction of the pilot and demonstration projects authorized in , each respondent shall include in its proposal (1) a plan leading to a full-scale, first-of-a-kind facility based on a proposed demonstration system; and (2) the financial and other contributions the respondent will make toward meeting the national goals.section 9009(c) of this title
